newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. FY ended March 2026 results are out; trailing 12M still carry an ~JPY8.5B one-off loss and negative earnings growth. The +7.2% move is a modest sector lift with no new fundamental driver.

sources.label: JEOL earnings / one-off loss (Simply Wall St)

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling lens: JEOL is scientific instrumentation/metrology, only loosely tied to the scaling thesis. No new evidence since June 8 down-move; one-off loss and soft earnings persist. Hold the long tail at scoreDelta 0.
verdicts.bull: Electron-microscope/metrology and EB lithography franchise with semiconductor adjacency.
verdicts.neutral: Quiet; loose fit to scaling; earnings still digesting a large one-off charge.
verdicts.bear: Negative earnings growth and weak profitability; peripheral to the AI-compute bottleneck.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Semiconductor instrument / EB lithography order recovery.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Cyclical instrument demand and depressed margins.
